summary: Start M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 after M5-TASK-GRAPH-001 closed on origin/main at e6d539ebf8ea1bd032ef5ad5aa1e4beb467ed802. The task is limited to a planning-only playable-slice contract and must not change product code or gated decisions.

tests_run.result: HEAD, origin/main, and main all resolved to e6d539ebf8ea1bd032ef5ad5aa1e4beb467ed802 before starting M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001.
M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 was the next dependency-ready task.

decisions: Use gameplay_designer as primary writer and systems_architect as required reviewer per task file.
Keep all changes within the task's allowed process/status paths.

Preserve M5 Human Gates for formal passage, manual node battle, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial choices, branding, frozen architecture/platform/core changes, major cultural-risk decisions, and irreversible migrations.
risks: The slice contract may reveal a required gated decision; if so, the task must stop and route the issue to the appropriate Human Gate instead of silently deciding it.
requested_action: Define the bounded M5 playable-slice contract, move the task to REVIEW, produce the writer handoff, and route back to lead_orchestrator for systems_architect review.
